landmark_notes: Main landmark exposes status summary and request detail regions.
Navigation landmark includes dashboard return link only.

observed_fields.label: Request status
observed_fields.note: Stable accessible role and label in synthetic read-only note.

observed_fields.label: Review group
observed_fields.note: Label adjacency is usable but should be reviewer-held before promotion.

validation_notes: Required document controls are not represented in this read-only surface delta.
Status text must remain redacted and normalized to category-level labels only.
abort_notes: Abort if DevHub asks for sign-in, MFA, CAPTCHA, payment, upload, submission, scheduling, cancellation, or certification.
Abort if any browser artifact, auth state, screenshot, trace, HAR, cookie, or raw authenticated value would be stored.
reviewer_notes: Hold for reviewer because selector confidence for review_group is below promotion threshold.
Hold for reviewer before any active surface-map, prompt, guardrail, contract, source registry, process model, or release-state change.
